name: Futari (Coconut-peanut Pumpkin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the onion in oil until golden.
2. Add pumpkin and sweet potatoes to a heavy pot.
3. Stir in lemon juice, cloves, salt, and 1 cup coconut milk.
4. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Uncover, stir gently, and add cinnamon.
6. Cook for an additional 15 to 20 minutes, stirring often to prevent sticking.
7. If necessary, add more milk to thin the mixture.
VARIATION: Thin 1/4 cup peanut butter with 1/2 cup hot water, adding water gradually. Add more water to reach a cup and use in place of coconut milk.
